description.en_US: Set the timezone for the alist-sync application.
The port used by alist-sync for its service.
Directory where the alist-sync application stores its data.

author: xjxjin
description: Alist-Sync is a storage synchronization tool based on the Web interface. It can achieve data synchronization and mutual backup among multiple network disks, and also has practical functions such as multi-task management, scheduled synchronization and difference handling.
tagline: An Alist storage synchronization tool based on the Web interface.

tips.before_install: The default login password is admin/admin.

title: Alist-Sync
release_note: - v1.1.5 fixes an error when the regular expression is empty.
